title: hydrocotyle umbellata subsp. bonariensis
intro: Hydrocotyle umbellata subsp. bonariensis, also known as pennywort or American pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as fever, sore throat, and digestive issues. The health benefits of pennywort include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress, improve cognitive function, and support the immune system. Pennywort can be prepared as a herbal tea or capsule, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
